game_info.title: Rain World P5
game_info.concept:
You are a nomadic slugcat, both predator and prey in a broken ecosystem. Grab your spear and brave the industrial wastes, hunting enough food to survive, but be wary— other, bigger creatures have the same plan... and slugcats look delicious. Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/312520/Rain_World/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ You are a nomadic slugcat, both predator and prey in a broken ecosystem. Grab your spear and brave the industrial wastes, hunting enough food to survive, but be wary— other, bigger creatures have the same plan... and slugcats look delicious.

Updates


  • Uncover the most popular mods from the thriving modding community with Steam Workshop Support.
  • Toggle new features and comprehensive customization options in Remix to suit your individual needs.
  • Learn new tips and tricks with updated tutorial messages to help players understand Rain World's intricate ecosystem.
  • Control your unique campaign with accessibility, speedrun, and difficulty options sculpted to your particular taste and style.


    Features


  • Explore a vast world of over 1600 rooms, spanning 12 diverse regions filled with ancient secrets and undiscovered dangers.
  • Intense, primal predator encounters will challenge your reflexes. Limited resources and the constant, impending threat of rain will test your nerve.
  • Procedural design and individualistic AI— every playthrough is a unique challenge!
  • Play as The Monk and The Hunter! 2 playable characters corresponding to easier and more aggressive playstyles.
  • Multiplayer Arena for up to 4 players, featuring Competitive and Sandbox modes.
  • Bestiary featuring dangerous predators and delicious prey


    More from Rain World


    About the Game



    You are a slugcat. The world around you is full of danger, and you must face it – alone. Separated from your family in a devastating flood, you will need to find food and shelter between terrifying torrential downpours which threaten to drown all life. Climb through the ruins of an ancient civilization, evade the jaws of vicious predators, and discover new lands teeming with strange creatures and buried mysteries. Find your family before something makes a meal of you!

    Inspired by the simplicity and aesthetics of 16-bit classics, this survival platformer requires clever decision-making, both to catch your own prey and to avoid the jaws of hungry predators. Each ravenous foe in your path will be cunning, vicious and always on the hunt – eager to sink their teeth into you, or even each other. As a small, soft slugcat you must rely on stealth and wit rather than force: learn the ecosystem and turn their strengths to your advantage. Maybe then you can survive… Rain World!
game_info.description:
You are a lone Slugcat in a vast, decaying industrial wasteland. The ecosystem is broken; you are both predator and prey.

Your goal is to survive the cycle:
1. Hunt for food (Batflies and Blue Fruits) to fill your hunger meter.
2. Avoid or fight off deadly Lizards that roam the ruins.
3. Find a Shelter and hibernate before the crushing Rain arrives.

The world is dangerous. Use your agility to climb poles, crawl through tunnels, and throw debris to defend yourself. Watch the rain timer—when the sky darkens, death is imminent unless you are safe in a shelter.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move, Run
- Arrow Up/Down: Climb Poles, Stand Up / Crouch
- Space: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Shift: Sprint / Crawl (if crouching)
- Z: Pick up object / Throw object / Eat food (hold)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (after Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Survival and Movement Verification. The test verifies that the player can move, interact with physics (gravity, collisions), and survive for a short duration without crashing or falling out of bounds.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The controller will input random valid movement commands (Left, Right, Jump) to navigate the terrain. It will prioritize staying above the death plane (bottom of screen) and avoiding immediate hazards.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 10 seconds. The player's position changes but remains within valid world bounds. No runtime errors occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Food Collection and Hunger Mechanic. The test verifies that food entities can be detected, picked up, and consumed to increase the hunger meter.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller scans for the nearest 'Food' or 'Batfly' entity. It calculates a path to the entity, moves towards it, presses 'Z' to grab it, and holds 'Z' to eat it.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's hunger score increases by at least 1 point. The food entity is removed from the world state.

TEST_3.test_description: Predator Evasion. The test ensures that the enemy AI (Lizards) tracks the player and that the player can be killed, triggering the correct Game Over state.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller will locate the nearest Lizard and intentionally move into its bite range to trigger a game-over condition to verify the lose state logic.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The game state transitions to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" after the player collides with a hostile Lizard's head hitbox.

TEST_4.test_description: Shelter and Win Condition. The test validates the ability to complete a cycle by reaching the shelter with sufficient food.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The controller artificially sets the player's position near the shelter and sets hunger to max (cheat/debug simulation via inputs if possible, or precise movement). Then it attempts to enter the shelter.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The game state transitions to "GAME_OVER_WIN" (Hibernation) upon entering the shelter zone with sufficient food.
